'''Orryxians''' were an intelligent, [[Sentience|sentient]] [[Feline/Legends|feline]] [[Species/Legends|species]]<ref name="CSWE" /> from the [[Orryxia system/Legends|Orryxia system]]<ref name="Planetnamia">{{Planetnamia|species=[[Orryxian]]|system=Orryxia [[Star system/Legends|system]]|legends=1}}</ref> in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> They were encountered often enough by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]'s [[Alliance Special Operations/Legends|Special Ops]] teams to acquire the nickname "[[Cat/Legends|Cats]]," though the Orryxians resented the colloquialism.<ref name="GG9">''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]''</ref> The popular<ref name="TruAtBak">''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]''</ref> intoxicating<ref name="GG9" /> beverage [[Orryxian Catsblood]], also from the Orryxia system, shared its name<ref name="TruAtBak" /> with the Orryxian species.<ref name="CSWE" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Orryxians were first mentioned in ''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]'', a supplement to [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' written by [[Simon Smith]] and [[Eric S. Trautmann]] and published in [[1993]].<ref name="GG9" />
